title: NC State Basketball Tickets Available for 2026 ACC Tournament
summary: Tickets are now available for the 2026 ACC Tournament in Charlotte, where NC State will be competing.
charlotte_impact: Sports events drive tourism and local revenue, impacting Charlotte's economy and community engagement.

title: Stanley Martin Homes Opens New Community in Sherrills Ford, NC

title: Trump Misstates Facts About NC in State of the Union Address
summary: Trump incorrectly attributed the suspect in a Charlotte murder case to having crossed open borders, when the suspect was a U.S. citizen.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the importance of factual accuracy in political discourse and its impact on public perception.
